available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table certifications ( id bigint generated by default as identity, credential_id varchar(255), credential_url varchar(255), expiration_date date, issue_date date, issuer varchar(255) not null, list_order integer, name varchar(255) not null, resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table educations ( id bigint generated by default as identity, board varchar(255), cgpa float(24), city varchar(255), college varchar(255), country varchar(255), course varchar(255), degree varchar(255) not null, end_year integer, grade varchar(255), list_order integer, percentage float(24), specialization varchar(255), start_year integer, university varchar(255), resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table experiences ( id bigint generated by default as identity, achievements TEXT, company varchar(255) not null, employment_type varchar(255), end_date date, industry varchar(255), is_current_job boolean, job_title varchar(255) not null, list_order integer, location varchar(255), responsibilities TEXT, start_date date, team_size integer, technologies varchar(255), work_mode varchar(255), resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table personal_details ( id bigint generated by default as identity, address TEXT, alternate_phone varchar(255), behance varchar(255), city varchar(255), codechef varchar(255), codeforces varchar(255), country varchar(255), current_position varchar(255), custom_links TEXT, date_of_birth date, dribbble varchar(255), email varchar(255), first_name varchar(255), geeksforgeeks varchar(255), github varchar(255), hackerrank varchar(255), kaggle varchar(255), last_name varchar(255), leetcode varchar(255), linkedin varchar(255), medium varchar(255), middle_name varchar(255), nationality varchar(255), phone varchar(255), photo_url varchar(255), portfolio varchar(255), postal_code varchar(255), preferred_name varchar(255), professional_title varchar(255), stackoverflow varchar(255), state varchar(255), twitter varchar(255), website varchar(255), resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table projects ( id bigint generated by default as identity, achievements TEXT, app_store_url varchar(255), challenges TEXT, detailed_description TEXT, duration varchar(255), features TEXT, github_url varchar(255), learnings TEXT, list_order integer, live_demo_url varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, play_store_url varchar(255), role varchar(255), short_description varchar(255), team_size integer, tech_stack varchar(255), resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table resume_versions ( id uuid not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, resume_data_json TEXT not null, version_name varchar(255) not null, resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table resumes ( id uuid not null, accent_color varchar(255), created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, font varchar(255), font_size varchar(255), line_spacing float(24), margins float(24), paper_size varchar(255), section_order varchar(255), show_icons boolean, show_photo boolean, target_job_role varchar(255), template_id varchar(255), title varchar(255) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, user_id uuid, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table skills ( id bigint generated by default as identity, category varchar(255) not null, items varchar(255) not null, list_order integer, resume_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( id uuid not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, email varchar(255) not null, full_name varchar(255), password varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','GUEST','PREMIUM','REGISTERED') not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists personal_details drop constraint if exists
